## beehiiv subscriptions jwt-token

Get subscription JWT token

### Synopsis

Get subscription JWT token

Generate a JWT token that can be used to automatically log in subscribers via URL. This token is short lived and should be used immediately.

API path: /publications/{publicationId}/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/jwt_token

```
beehiiv subscriptions jwt-token <subscriptionId> [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help                help for jwt-token
      --query stringArray   Add a repeatable query parameter in key=value form
```
